# Repository Analysis: Digital Detox / Focus / Habit Tracker Patterns
Generated: 2026-04-06

## 1. Repos Inspected

| Repo | Stars | URL | License | Relevance (1-5) | Notes |
|------|-------|-----|---------|-----------------|-------|
| **Loop Habit Tracker (uhabits)** | 8.2k+ | github.com/iSoron/uhabits | GPL-3.0 | **5** | Gold-standard streak/score/entry model, 10yr maturity, Kotlin but patterns translate directly |
| **Spotube** | 34k+ | github.com/KRTirtho/spotube | BSD-4-Clause | **3** | Flutter+Riverpod production app; timer provider, blacklist notifier patterns |
| **LocalSend** | 55k+ | github.com/localsend/localsend | Apache-2.0 | **2** | Flutter; session state model with status enum, but uses Refena not Riverpod |
| **Starter Architecture (Code with Andrea)** | 2.8k+ | github.com/bizz84/starter_architecture_flutter_firebase | MIT | **4** | Canonical Riverpod+GoRouter+Firebase arch; Entry model, onboarding repository, controller pattern |
| **Wonderous** | 4.1k+ | github.com/gskinnerTeam/flutter-wonderous-app | MIT | **2** | gskinner showcase; clean logic/ui separation, but no timer/habit domain |

---

## 2. Top Patterns Found

### PATTERN 1: Exponential Moving Average Score (uhabits)
**Source:** uhabits-core/.../models/Score.kt:42-52

The formula: score = previousScore * multiplier + checkmarkValue * (1 - multiplier)
where multiplier = 0.5^(sqrt(frequency) / 13.0)

A daily habit drops 50% score in ~13 days of inactivity. Forgiving but honest.
**Adopt into:** lib/providers/user_provider.dart - add focusScore alongside streak.

### PATTERN 2: Streak Computation from Entry List (uhabits)
**Source:** uhabits-core/.../models/StreakList.kt:38-78

Streaks are computed ON DEMAND from the entry log, not stored as a running counter. Walks sorted dates, groups consecutive days into Streak(start, end) objects. Timezone changes, backdated entries, data corrections all work correctly.
**Adopt into:** lib/providers/user_provider.dart - replace stored streak counter with computed streaks from session history.

### PATTERN 3: Entry Value Enum with SKIP/UNKNOWN States (uhabits)
**Source:** uhabits-core/.../models/Entry.kt:38-65

Values: SKIP(3), YES_MANUAL(2), YES_AUTO(1), NO(0), UNKNOWN(-1)
Distinguishes user-did-it from no-data-yet from user-skipped. Prevents false streak breaks.
**Adopt into:** New lib/models/daily_entry.dart with {completed, skipped, missed, unknown}.

### PATTERN 4: Reminder Scheduler with Snooze (uhabits)
**Source:** uhabits-core/.../reminders/ReminderScheduler.kt:37-153

Re-schedules ALL reminders on any habit change. Snooze stored as future timestamp in prefs. Robust - no stale notifications.
**Adopt into:** lib/services/notification_scheduler.dart - cancel all + re-schedule pattern.

### PATTERN 5: AsyncNotifier + AsyncValue.guard Controller (Code with Andrea)
**Source:** starter_architecture/.../entry_screen_controller.dart

state = const AsyncLoading();
state = await AsyncValue.guard(() => repository.addEntry(...));
return state.hasError == false;

Canonical Riverpod 2.0 form submission pattern. No manual error/loading flags.
**Adopt into:** lib/providers/session_provider.dart - migrate to @riverpod codegen.

### PATTERN 6: Onboarding Repository + GoRouter Redirect (Code with Andrea)
**Source:** starter_architecture/.../onboarding/data/onboarding_repository.dart

SharedPreferences bool flag + Riverpod provider + GoRouter redirect guard. Clean separation.
**Adopt into:** lib/config/routes.dart + new onboarding_repository.dart

### PATTERN 7: Blacklist as AsyncNotifier with DB Stream (Spotube)
**Source:** spotube/lib/provider/blacklist_provider.dart

AsyncNotifier watches DB stream, auto-updates. Exposes contains() and filter() helpers. Persists across restarts.
**Adopt into:** lib/providers/blocklist_provider.dart - migrate to AsyncNotifier + Supabase/local DB.

### PATTERN 8: Session State with Status + Timestamps (LocalSend)
**Source:** localsend/.../model/state/send/send_session_state.dart

Session carries sessionId, status enum, startTime, endTime, errorMessage. Shared SessionState interface between different session types.
**Adopt into:** lib/models/focus_session.dart - add errorMessage, extract TimedSession interface for focus+duel.

### PATTERN 9: Immutable State + Computed Getters (uhabits Habit)
**Source:** uhabits-core/.../models/Habit.kt

Carries originalEntries (raw) and computedEntries (with auto-fills). Scores and streaks recomputed from entries, never manually incremented. Call recompute() and everything is consistent.
**Adopt into:** Architecture principle - separate raw session log from computed stats.

---

## 3. Priority Integration List

| # | Pattern | Impact | Effort | Label | Why First |
|---|---------|--------|--------|-------|-----------|
| 1 | **Streak from Entry Log** (#2) | HIGH | Medium | **adapt** | Fixes timezone/edit bugs before they ship |
| 2 | **AsyncNotifier + guard** (#5) | HIGH | Medium | **adapt** | Modernizes all providers to Riverpod 2.0 idiom |
| 3 | **EMA Focus Score** (#1) | HIGH | Low | **drop-in** | 15-line function, instant gamification depth |
| 4 | **Blocklist as AsyncNotifier+DB** (#7) | HIGH | Medium | **adapt** | Blocklist currently does not persist |
| 5 | **Daily Entry Value Enum** (#3) | MEDIUM | Low | **adapt** | Foundation for correct streak + stats |
| 6 | **Notification Re-schedule All** (#4) | MEDIUM | Medium | **inspire** | Prevents stale notification bugs |
| 7 | **Onboarding Repository+Redirect** (#6) | MEDIUM | Low | **drop-in** | Clean onboarding gate in GoRouter |
| 8 | **TimedSession Interface** (#8) | LOW | Low | **inspire** | Code reuse between focus + duel timers |

---

## 4. Risks

| Risk | Severity | Mitigation |
|------|----------|------------|
| **GPL-3.0 (uhabits)** | HIGH | Do NOT copy code verbatim. Translate algorithm/pattern to Dart independently. The EMA formula is math, not copyrightable, but surrounding code is GPL. |
| **Riverpod version skew** | MEDIUM | Spotube uses hooks_riverpod + StateNotifier (old). Code with Andrea uses riverpod_annotation + codegen (new). Prefer codegen (@riverpod). |
| **Refena vs Riverpod** | LOW | LocalSend uses Refena. Only take state model shapes, not provider wiring. |
| **Flutter version** | LOW | All repos target Flutter 3.x. No breaking changes expected. |
| **Over-engineering** | MEDIUM | uhabits has 10 years of complexity (numerical habits, AT_MOST targets). Take only core streak/score patterns, skip numerical habit machinery. |
